Tests the behavior of Math.cos with a string input that represents "NaN".

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that uses the `assert` function to verify the behavior of the `Math.cos` function when given a string input that represents "NaN". The test checks if the result of `Math.cos("   NaN")` is `NaN`, which is expected behavior when a non-numeric string is passed to a mathematical function. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific edge case for the `Math.cos` function.
